title: youkie's Blog
subTitle: Even after I'm gone, it will live on forever on GitHub.
allHead: <script> (function() { var a_idx = 0; window.onclick = function(event) { var a = ["富强", "民主", "文明", "和谐", "自由", "平等", "公正", "法治", "爱国", "敬业", "诚信", "友善"]; var heart = document.createElement("b"); heart.onselectstart = function() { return false; }; document.body.appendChild(heart).innerHTML = a[a_idx]; a_idx = (a_idx + 1) % a.length; heart.style.zIndex = 9999; heart.style.top = (event.pageY - 20) + "px"; heart.style.left = (event.pageX) + "px"; heart.style.position = "absolute"; heart.style.fontWeight = "bold"; heart.style.color = "#ff6651"; var f = 16, t = event.pageY - 20, r = 1, i = 1; var timer = setInterval(function() { if (r <= 0) { clearInterval(timer); heart.remove(); } heart.style.top = (t - i) + "px"; heart.style.opacity = r; heart.style.fontSize = f + "px"; t--; i++; r -= 0.02; }, 15); } })(); </script>
